filename: 22.11.24 Study Design - Ada Zhihan Anniina Joona.md
relative_path: 4. Meetings & Updates/Meeting_notes/2024/22.11.24 Study Design - Ada Zhihan Anniina Joona.md
full_text:
**1.Tuulia Bruno's Talk summary** (10 min)

- Share your thoughts and key takeaways from the talk.

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
- Milky spots: we should mark these based on CD4/CD8 B cell
 > compartmentalization

 - How do milky spots develop into TLSs? Could we characterize them
 > more in depth

 - What drives this development

 - Maybe we should think of "B cell biology in the omentum"

 - PNAd antibody - directly conjugated antibody in 488 channel

- The paper was clinically vague, the main result was the signature,
 > which was prognostic

**2. Ada's Results** (15 min)

- **IDS Profiling**: Results summary (Tumor %, HRD/HRP status) + how
 > many samples belong to iCan?

 - Discussion on which kind of samples to profile based on this
 > information

 > \- We can do RAD51 staining

SCALE + TIMEFRAME

- **tCycIF panel considerations**: Lead discussion on SPACE-like panel
 > effectiveness, gather opinions on the extra cycle consideration.

**Coordination updates**:

- 24-tube tray order update.

 > Lina's lab time for proteo-picks (potential 2-3 month contract
 > extension). [\@Lina
 > Maltrovsky](https://farkkilalab.slack.com/team/U07KH7J0ULB) will
 > join for this part of the meeting

**3. Zhihan's Results** (20 min)

- **EyeMT Annotations & Pair Review**:

 > **GeoMx Planning**:

 - Re-utilizable info from the First/Second Batch of EyeMT: number

f the meeting

**3. Zhihan's Results** (20 min)

- **EyeMT Annotations & Pair Review**:

 > **GeoMx Planning**:

 - Re-utilizable info from the First/Second Batch of EyeMT: number
 > of potential CD4/CD8 aggregate samples for further analysis
 > (Omentum).

 > Summary of EyeMT GeoMx experiment (slides, ROIs):

 - Third Batch: Suitability for Jan experiments (TLS presence,
 > Omentum tissue, Tumor %).

 > **Lead discussion on how many samples to share and how
 > many more samples/ROI/AOIs to include?**

 > **Morphology Marker Panel**: Agree on sample scale and
 > experimental design.

**4. Master's Thesis & Student Recruitment** (5 min)

- Progress update + any criteria or alignment changes for student
 > projects?

**5. Next Steps** (15 min)

- Update GANTT diagram, set new goals, and divide tasks for the next
 > meeting.
